---
name: topic-clusterer
description: Groups documents by topics and themes for better organization. Use this when organizing large collections of documents by subject matter.
---

Cluster documents by topics:
- Identify common themes across all cached documents
- Create topic categories (e.g., "Technical", "Strategy", "Operations")
- Assign documents to one or more topics
- Generate topic index files in workspace/summaries/topics/
- Create visualization of topic relationships if possible
- Suggest topic taxonomy improvements based on document collection

## Topic Clustering Process

1. **Initial Scan**: Review all cached documents to identify broad themes
2. **Category Definition**: Define 5-10 major topic categories
3. **Document Assignment**: Assign each document to one or more topics
4. **Relationship Mapping**: Identify how topics relate to each other
5. **Index Generation**: Create topic index files for easy navigation

## Topic Index Format

```markdown
# Topic: [Topic Name]

**Description:** [What this topic covers]
**Document Count:** [Number of documents]

## Documents in This Topic

### Primary Documents
- [Document 1] - [Brief description]
- [Document 2] - [Brief description]

### Related Documents
- [Document 3] - [Brief description]

## Related Topics
- [Related Topic 1]
- [Related Topic 2]

## Key Themes
- [Theme 1]
- [Theme 2]
```
